title: Lock acquisition rule
notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

All commands are local validation, parser, test, or git whitespace checks; none execute service logic, create runtime routes, append audit ledgers, write audit events, create UI, persist idempotency records, acquire locks, persist lock records, write lock stores, or mutate product state.
Pre-closeout npm run rp00:control-plane:validate failed only because S11 evidence files were intentionally not created yet; this command is rerun after evidence creation as the final gate.

Claude reported a P0 environment-integrity concern, not an S11 code defect; it is adjudicated rejected/not-applicable for S11 code closeout because the completed CLI run had no tools and the local validation commands in this Codex environment passed independently.

Claude advisory about lock_receipt_fields being a required subset is adjudicated non-blocking/no-change because the full lock_receipt provenance shape is explicitly pinned by validators, matching prior receipt slices.

commands.summary: Final S11 closeout gate rerun after evidence creation
